---
title: "Hi, I'm Mia Cortez"
---

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](p1.png){width=100% style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 3rem;"}
I am a Business Administration student with a focus in Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona. My portfolio highlights my work in marketing analytics, data visualization, Google Analytics, dashboards, and Quarto projects.
:::
:::

## About Me

I am interested in marketing analytics, digital marketing, and using data to better understand customers and business decisions. Through my IBM coursework, I have practiced working with RStudio, Quarto, data wrangling, visualizations, dashboards, and presentations.

## Skills

- RStudio
- Quarto
- Data wrangling
- Data visualization
- Google Analytics 4
- Marketing analytics
- Dashboard design
- Presentation design

## Career Goal

My goal is to build a career in marketing where I can use data, creativity, and strategy to help businesses make better decisions and connect with customers.

## Highlighted Work

This portfolio includes selected IBM assignments, including marketing analytics projects, Google Analytics work, dashboard examples, and a Revealjs presentation.

## Let's Connect

You can email me at [mscortez@cpp.edu](mailto:youremail@example.com) or connect with me on LinkedIn **https://www.linkedin.com/in/miacortezz/**

---

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
